title: Smoky Moroccan Crumble Bars
description: A delicious dessert that combines the warmth of smoky spices with the crunch of a crumble topping, all wrapped up in a flaky pastry crust.

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough and place in a 9x9 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the smoked almonds, Mars bar pieces, and Moroccan spices.
Pour the almond mixture into the pastry crust and top with granulated sugar.
Crumble the crumble topping over the sugar and bake for 35-40 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing into bars.
